productDisplayName: Disney Kids Boy's Tiger Print Denim Pants
description: Composition:100% cotton dark blue denim pants with Tigger printWashcare:Machine wash in cold water with a gentle cycle using mild detergent. Wash dark colours seperately. Do not bleach. Do not soak nor wring. Dry it inside out. Do not tumble dry. Do not iron on print and studs.Fitting:Comfort FitIt's fun and frolick this summer for little girls in this dark blue denim pants and a playful Tigger across one pocket, with a colourful rpint of this favourite toonie's name on the other. Couple this with white, frilly tops and and your darling is all set for that summer party.
